name: Feature request
about: Propose a change or addition to Arch
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement

## Problem / use case

<!-- What are you trying to do that Arch can't do today? -->

## Proposed behavior

<!-- What should Arch do? If it affects the `.arch` language, the IR, generated
     output, or the sync/verify loop, describe the desired behavior concretely. -->

## Scope check

Arch V1 targets **one TypeScript/Fastify/Prisma backend workflow service per
`backend.arch`**. Proposals are most likely to land if they fit that scope (see
`founding-docs/` and `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md`).

- [ ] I've checked this fits the V1 scope, or I'm proposing it as a post-V1 idea

## Acceptance criteria

<!-- How would we know it works? A test we could write, an example spec +
     expected output, etc. Arch is test-first. -->
